span.p: User request arrives at Team Lead

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Trivial Q&A, single-file ≤10-line tweak,
or pure orchestration question?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Team Lead handles directly
NO spawn

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Touches auth, secrets, PII/PCI/PHI,
RLS/FLS, or a new external surface?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Spawn security-reviewer
(may run in parallel with builder)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Multi-file design choice not yet made,
OR cross-cutting interface change?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Spawn architect FIRST
plan then dispatch builders

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deliverable is prose for a human audience,
NOT code?
